article_meta.title: Metro An open letter from the heart of Iran to America – Don’t give up on us By California Post Staff Published March 7, 2026, 7:11 p.m

reasoning: The model repeatedly flagged first-person source narrative as author bias, violating attribution rules, used non-approved bias type labels, and largely produced false positives. The article’s connective author prose is minimal; most content is attributed to a source.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Nearly all flagged passages are the source’s first-person statements (Omid), not the author’s prose.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Items flagged as bias are either attributed/source content or neutral attribution lines, not genuine author-level bias.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: There are no clear, significant bias instances in the author’s connective prose that were missed.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: The model used non-listed categories (e.g., Framing Bias, Source Bias, Political Bias) and misaligned labels relative to the allowed set.
